cases.name: orbital_kepler
cases.text:
{
Type = "RenderableOrbitalKepler",
DimInAtmosphere = false,
Enabled = true,
Opacity = 0.8,
RenderBinMode = "Opaque",
Tag = {"science, migration"},
Color = {1.0, 0.5, 0.25},
Format = "SBDB",
Path = asset.resource("fixture orbit.csv"),
SegmentQuality = 42,
ContiguousMode = true,
EnableMaxSize = false,
EnableOutline = true,
MaxSize = 12.5,
OutlineColor = {0.1, 0.2, 0.3},
OutlineWidth = 2.5,
PointSizeExponent = 1.25,
Rendering = "PointsTrails",
RenderSize = 8,
StartRenderIdx = 1,
TrailFade = 0.75,
TrailWidth = 0.33,
}

cases.name: trail_orbit
cases.text:
{
Type = "RenderableTrailOrbit",
DimInAtmosphere = true,
Enabled = false,
Opacity = 0.55,
RenderBinMode = "PreDeferredTransparent",
Tag = "single-tag",
Color = {0.2, 0.4, 0.6},
Period = 365.25,
Resolution = 86400,
Translation = {
    Type = "KeplerTranslation",
    ArgumentOfPeriapsis = 45.25,
    AscendingNode = 180.0,
    Eccentricity = 0.123456789,
    Epoch = "2026-07-06 12:34:56.789",
    Inclination = 12.5,
    MeanAnomaly = 270.75,
    Period = 31557600.0,
    SemiMajorAxis = 149597870.7,
},
EnableFade = true,
LineFadeAmount = 0.4,
LineLength = 25.0,
LineWidth = 1.5,
PointSize = 3,
Rendering = "Lines+Points",
}

cases.name: trail_trajectory
cases.text:
{
Type = "RenderableTrailTrajectory",
DimInAtmosphere = false,
Enabled = true,
Opacity = 0.95,
RenderBinMode = "Overlay",
Tag = {"trajectory, fixture"},
Color = {0.9, 0.8, 0.7},
EndTime = "2026-07-16T00:00:00.000",
StartTime = "2026-07-06T00:00:00.000",
Translation = {
    Type = "SpiceTranslation",
    Observer = "SOLAR SYSTEM BARYCENTER",
    Target = -12345,
    FixedDate = "2026 JUL 06 00:00:00",
    Frame = "ECLIPJ2000",
},
AccurateTrailPositions = 1,
EnableFade = false,
EnableSweepChunking = 2,
LineFadeAmount = 0.2,
LineLength = 10.0,
LineWidth = 0.5,
PointSize = 4,
Rendering = "Points",
SampleInterval = 600.0,
ShowFullTrail = true,
SweepChunkSize = 64,
TimeStampSubsampleFactor = 3,
}

cases.name: asset
cases.text:
{
Identifier = "Fixture_Object",
Parent = "SunEclipJ2000",
GUI = {
    Name = "Fixture Object",
    Path = "/ADAM/Fixtures",
},
Renderable = {
    Type = "RenderableOrbitalKepler",
    DimInAtmosphere = false,
    Enabled = true,
    Opacity = 0.8,
    RenderBinMode = "Opaque",
    Tag = {"science, migration"},
    Color = {1.0, 0.5, 0.25},
    Format = "SBDB",
    Path = asset.resource("fixture orbit.csv"),
    SegmentQuality = 42,
    ContiguousMode = true,
    EnableMaxSize = false,
    EnableOutline = true,
    MaxSize = 12.5,
    OutlineColor = {0.1, 0.2, 0.3},
    OutlineWidth = 2.5,
    PointSizeExponent = 1.25,
    Rendering = "PointsTrails",
    RenderSize = 8,
    StartRenderIdx = 1,
    TrailFade = 0.75,
    TrailWidth = 0.33,
},
Transform = {
    Translation = {
        Type = "SpiceTranslation",
        Observer = "SOLAR SYSTEM BARYCENTER",
        Target = -12345,
        FixedDate = "2026 JUL 06 00:00:00",
        Frame = "ECLIPJ2000",
    },
},
}
